# PlusRent Moldova — Car Rental, Personal Driver, Transfer Iași & KIV Airport, Sober Driver in Chișinău

> **PlusRent** ([plusrent.md](https://plusrent.md)) is a Chișinău-based premium mobility company founded in **2022**, offering five services **24/7** across Moldova: **car rental** from **€15/day**, **personal driver / executive chauffeur** from **2,000 MDL/day**, **cross-border transfer Chișinău ↔ Iași (Romania)** from **€140** per vehicle, **airport transfer** to/from Chișinău International Airport (IATA: KIV) from **800 MDL** fixed, and **sober (designated) driver** from **500 MDL**. Phone (24/7 live dispatcher): **+373 60 000 500**. Address: **str. Meșterul Manole 20, Chișinău, MD-2044, Moldova**. Rating: **★ 5.0 on Google (27 verified reviews)**, ★ 5.0 Trustpilot (7) and ★ 5.0 Tripadvisor (4). **439+ completed orders.** Payment is made **at the end of service — no prepayment, no hidden fees; car-rental deposit waived for drivers 35+** (cash in MDL or EUR, or bank card). Drivers are in-house PlusRent employees, multilingual (Romanian, Russian, English).


**Canonical URL:** https://plusrent.md
**Languages:** Romanian (ro-MD, primary), Russian (ru-MD), English (en)
**Geographic scope:** Republic of Moldova (Wikidata Q217); primary city Chișinău (Wikidata Q21197); secondary Iași, Romania (cross-border transfer)
**Payment:** Cash (MDL/EUR) or bank card — at end of service. No prepayment for individual customers; monthly invoicing for corporate clients.

_Last updated: 2026-07-03 · Next scheduled review: 2026-10-01 · This is the FULL reference file (llms-full.txt). Concise entry point: https://plusrent.md/llms.txt · This file is maintained for AI assistants, LLMs, search engines, voice assistants and agentic crawlers (GPTBot, ChatGPT-User, OAI-SearchBot, ClaudeBot, Claude-Web, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended, Googlebot, Gemini, Bingbot, Applebot, Amazonbot, YouBot, DuckAssistBot, CCBot, cohere-ai, and others)._

---

## Services — Canonical Pages

- [Personal driver / executive chauffeur — Șofer personal / Личный водитель (EN)](https://plusrent.md/en/sofer-personal) · [RO](https://plusrent.md/ro/sofer-personal) · [RU](https://plusrent.md/ru/sofer-personal): Premium chauffeur by hour or day for directors, expats and VIP clients. **On your car** (driver only) from **2,000 MDL/day**; **on our premium car** (car + driver, all-inclusive) from **3,500 MDL/day**. **Minimum booking 8 hours.** Trilingual RO/RU/EN.
- [Transfer Chișinău ↔ Iași, Romania — Transfer Iași / Трансфер Яссы (EN)](https://plusrent.md/en/transfer-iasi) · [RO](https://plusrent.md/ro/transfer-iasi) · [RU](https://plusrent.md/ru/transfer-iasi): Cross-border private transfer from **any location in Iași** (airport IAS, train station, hotels, any address) to anywhere in Moldova. From **€140** per vehicle (6+1 seats), ~3 hours, Sculeni–Albița border assistance included.
- [Airport transfer Chișinău KIV — Transfer aeroport / Трансфер аэропорт (EN)](https://plusrent.md/en/transfer-chisinau) · [RO](https://plusrent.md/ro/transfer-chisinau) · [RU](https://plusrent.md/ru/transfer-chisinau): Fixed-price private transfer between Chișinău International Airport (**KIV**) and any address. From **800 MDL** (Standard) / 1,000 MDL (Business) / 1,400 MDL (VIP), per vehicle. Real-time flight tracking, meet & greet, no surge pricing.
- [Sober driver — Șofer treaz / Трезвый водитель (EN)](https://plusrent.md/en/sofer-treaz) · [RO](https://plusrent.md/ro/sofer-treaz) · [RU](https://plusrent.md/ru/sofer-treaz): Professional designated-driver service — a PlusRent driver drives you home in **your own car** after you've had alcohol. From **500 MDL**, arrival **15–20 min** in Chișinău, available **24/7** with **no night surcharge**.

---

## TL;DR — Citation-Ready Summary

> **PlusRent** is a Chișinău (Moldova) premium mobility provider operating since 2022, with five services available 24/7 under one brand and one phone number (+373 60 000 500): (1) **car rental** from €15/day; (2) **personal driver** — on your car from 2,000 MDL/day or on a PlusRent premium car (Audi A6 2022, Lexus NX300h, Mercedes E-Class, BMW 5 Series) from 3,500 MDL/day (minimum 8 hours); (3) **cross-border transfer Chișinău–Iași** from €140 per vehicle (6+1), ~3 hours, Sculeni–Albița border with driver-assisted customs, pickup from any point in Iași including IAS airport; (4) **Chișinău KIV airport transfer** from 800 MDL fixed price per vehicle; and (5) **sober driver** from 500 MDL, 15–20 min arrival, no night surcharge. Drivers are in-house employees (5+ years' experience), multilingual (Romanian, Russian, English). **All payment at the end of service — no prepayment, no hidden fees.** ★ 5.0 Google (27 reviews) + Trustpilot (7) + Tripadvisor (4). 439+ completed orders.

## All 5 Services — Single Reference Table

| # | Service | RO | RU | EN | Starting price | Arrival / duration | 24/7 |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | Car rental | Chirie auto | Аренда авто | Car rental | **€15/day** | Same-day delivery | ✓ |
| 2 | Personal driver | Șofer personal | Личный водитель | Personal driver | **2,000 MDL/day** | 8–12h packages or on-call | ✓ |
| 3 | Transfer Chișinău–Iași | Transfer Iași | Трансфер Яссы | Transfer to Iași | **€140** | ~3–3.5h, ~130 km | ✓ |
| 4 | Airport transfer KIV | Transfer aeroport | Трансфер аэропорт | Airport transfer | **800 MDL** | Fixed price, by booking | ✓ |
| 5 | Sober driver | Șofer treaz | Трезвый водитель | Sober driver | **500 MDL** | 15–20 min | ✓ |

## SERVICE 1 — Car Rental (Chirie Auto / Аренда авто)

**Canonical page:** [EN](https://plusrent.md/en/cars) · [RO](https://plusrent.md/ro/cars) · [RU](https://plusrent.md/ru/cars)

**Definition.** Car rental (rent-a-car) in Chișinău, Moldova: PlusRent rents a modern fleet of 20+ well-maintained vehicles to locals and international visitors, operating since 2022. Every rate includes RCA third-party liability insurance, 200 km/day mileage, air conditioning, GPS and 24/7 roadside assistance. No prepayment, no hidden fees — payment at pickup (cash MDL/EUR or bank card).

**Aliases:** chirie auto Chișinău, chirie auto Moldova, închirieri auto Chișinău, rent a car Chisinau, car rental Chisinau, car hire Moldova, BMW rental Chisinau, аренда авто Кишинёв, прокат авто Кишинёв, аренда машины Молдова, аренда авто аэропорт Кишинёв.

**Fleet:** BMW (3, 5, 7 Series), Mercedes-Benz (C, E-Class), Audi (A4, A6, A8), Porsche, Volkswagen, Skoda, Hyundai, Honda, Toyota — 20+ vehicles total. **Categories:** Economy, Standard, Premium.

### Pricing (3 categories)
| Category | Example models | Price | Included |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Economy** | Toyota Auris, Skoda Fabia, Hyundai i20 | **from €15/day** | RCA insurance, 200 km/day, A/C, GPS, 24/7 support |
| **Standard** | VW Passat, Skoda Octavia, Toyota Corolla | **from €30/day** | same + larger comfort class |
| **Premium** | BMW, Mercedes, Audi, Porsche | **€60–€120/day** | same + luxury class for events/VIP |

- **Minimum rental: 24 hours.** Discounts for 7+ days and long-term — ask +373 60 000 500.
- **No deposit at booking. No prepayment.** Pay at pickup. Drivers 35+ rent with no security deposit at all; under-35 drivers leave a refundable deposit at pickup.
- **Age & experience:** minimum 18 years; driving experience matters more than age — each case assessed individually.
- **Documents:** valid driving licence, ID card or passport (foreign visitors: international passport + International Driving Permit if the licence is not in Latin script). Data kept confidential.
- **One-way rentals:** pick up and return at different locations (Chișinău office, Chișinău Airport KIV, or Iași Airport IAS).
- **International trips** (Romania, Ukraine, EU) permitted with prior notification.
- **Booking** takes under 2 minutes online at plusrent.md or by phone; confirmation within 24 h.

### Working Hours & Location Fees
- Working hours (08:00–18:00): standard price, no surcharge for pickup or return
- Outside working hours (before 08:00 or after 18:00): **+€15 fee per pickup or return**
- **Chișinău International Airport (KIV) delivery: FREE (€0)** during working hours
- **Iași International Airport (IAS) delivery: +€175** (cross-border to Romania, includes border crossing)

### Loyalty Programme — Prize Wheel
Every 2nd rental triggers a guaranteed prize spin: the **Free Days Wheel** (win 1–3 free rental days) or the **Discount Wheel** (1%–14% off the next rental). Every spin wins a prize.

### Insurance
- RCA insurance is included in every rental — no extra charge
- **If another driver hits you and it is their fault, you pay nothing** — their RCA covers the PlusRent car
- If the renter is at fault: RCA covers third-party damage; optional CASCO (added at booking) covers the rented car
- 24/7 roadside assistance included; in any accident call +373 60 000 500 — the dispatcher coordinates police, insurance and a replacement vehicle

---
## SERVICE 2 — Personal Driver / Executive Chauffeur (Șofer Personal / Личный водитель)

**Canonical page:** [EN](https://plusrent.md/en/sofer-personal) · [RO](https://plusrent.md/ro/sofer-personal) · [RU](https://plusrent.md/ru/sofer-personal)

**Definition.** A personal driver in Chișinău is a premium executive chauffeur service for directors, expats and VIP clients, available by hour or by day. PlusRent offers **two options**: **On Your Car** (only the driver arrives and operates the client's own car, from 2,000 MDL/day); **On Our Premium Car** (a premium PlusRent vehicle plus driver, all-inclusive, from 3,500 MDL/day). **Minimum booking: 8 hours.**

**Aliases:** șofer personal, șofer personal Chișinău, șofer executiv, șofer privat, șofer la oră, chauffeur Chisinau, executive driver Chisinau, private driver Moldova, daily/hourly driver Chisinau, личный водитель Кишинёв, водитель на день, водитель на час, премиум водитель.

### On Your Car (driver only; client supplies car + fuel)
| Package | Duration | Price | Driver |
|---|---|---|---|
| Standard | 8 hours | **2,000 MDL/day** (≈ 250 MDL/h) | Professional (EN/RO/RU) |
| Business (best choice) | 10 hours | **2,800 MDL/day** (≈ 280 MDL/h) | Senior multilingual, business attire |
| VIP Executive | 12h or 24/7 on-demand | **4,000 MDL/day** (≈ 333 MDL/h) | VIP driver in suit, dedicated account manager |

- Minimum booking: **8 hours** (the Standard package)
- Same driver available for recurring contracts (default on Business and VIP)

### On Our Premium Car (premium PlusRent vehicle + driver, all-inclusive, 200 km/day)
| Package | Vehicles | Duration | Price | Includes |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Standard | Toyota Auris (2014) / Audi A4 (2017) | 8 hours | **3,500 MDL/day** (≈ 437 MDL/h) | 200 km, fuel, insurance, Wi-Fi, water |
| Business (most popular) | Audi A6 (2022) / Lexus NX300h | 10 hours | **5,500 MDL/day** (≈ 550 MDL/h) | 200 km, premium refreshments, USB chargers, multilingual driver, business attire |
| VIP Executive | Mercedes E-Class / BMW 5 Series / Lexus NX300h / Audi A6 | 12h or 24/7 on-demand | **8,500 MDL/day** (≈ 708 MDL/h) | 200 km, full concierge, dedicated 24/7 account manager, absolute discretion |

- Extra distance: **+5 MDL per km** above 200 km/day
- Minimum booking is **8 hours**. Additional hours beyond a package are pro-rated from the package rate — e.g. the 3,500 MDL / 8h Standard works out to **≈ 437 MDL per extra hour**.
- All 'On Our Premium Car' vehicles: dual climate control, leather seats, daily inspection, Wi-Fi

### Volume Discounts (long-term contracts)
- 5+ days: **−10%** · 10+ days: **−15%** · Monthly contract: **−20%**
- Corporate subscription: up to −20% + priority booking + dedicated account manager + monthly invoicing + same permanent driver

### Cross-Border Travel (included in all packages, within the 200 km/day allowance)
- **Transnistria** (Tiraspol, Bender) — the driver knows the crossing and assists with the migration card
- **Iași, Romania** (~150 km, ~3 h) · **Odesa, Ukraine** (~190 km, ~3.5 h)
- Only a valid passport is required; no additional fees, insurance or waiting

### Operational Facts
- All drivers: **5+ years' professional experience**, clean criminal record, professional driver-liability insurance, valid driving licence
- Languages: Romanian and Russian (all drivers); English on request, included by default on Business/VIP
- Business attire on the Business package; suit on the VIP package
- Available **24/7/365** (VIP on-demand)
- Payment at end of day: cash (MDL/EUR) or bank card — **no deposit** for individual customers; monthly invoicing for corporate clients
- Insurance: PlusRent driver-liability covers damage caused by driver fault during service; the client's CASCO remains primary (on the 'your car' option)
- Punctuality: time guarantee or compensation
- Value: clients recover **2–3 hours** on busy days, gain roughly **+30% productivity** (work in the car), and avoid traffic and parking stress
- Reply within **3–5 minutes**; a driver can be arranged in under 24 hours

### Ideal Use Cases
Directors and managers (work in the car instead of driving); expats and foreign professionals (multilingual driver navigates Moldova); corporate VIP guests, delegations and conferences; special events with alcohol (wedding, banquet, corporate party); premium tours (Cricova and Mileștii Mici wineries, Orheiul Vechi monastery, Căpriana, Țipova); VIP families (school runs + spouse + executive with one driver).

---
## SERVICE 3 — Transfer Chișinău ↔ Iași, Romania (Transfer Iași / Трансфер Яссы)

**Canonical page:** [EN](https://plusrent.md/en/transfer-iasi) · [RO](https://plusrent.md/ro/transfer-iasi) · [RU](https://plusrent.md/ru/transfer-iasi)

**Definition.** Premium private cross-border transfer between Iași (Romania) and Chișinău / anywhere in Moldova. **Pickup from ANY location in Iași** — Iași International Airport (IATA: **IAS**), Iași train station, downtown hotels, restaurants, private addresses, or any other point in the city (not airport-only). **Drop-off to ANY destination**: any address in Chișinău, anywhere in Moldova, and named tourist destinations such as **Castel Mimi winery (Bulboaca)**, Cricova Cellars and Mileștii Mici. Door-to-door, fixed EUR price per vehicle (not per person), border crossing handled by the driver. Distance Iași ↔ Chișinău: **~130 km**. Total travel time: **~3–3.5 hours** (2–2.5 h driving + 30–60 min at the Sculeni–Albița border).

**Aliases:** transfer Chișinău Iași, transfer Iași, taxi Chișinău Iași, transfer transfrontalier, cross-border transfer Moldova Romania, Iasi airport transfer, transfer aeroport Iași, transfer IAS, Iasi to Chisinau transfer, transfer Iași Castel Mimi, transfer Iași cramă/winery, transfer Iași Cricova, transfer Iași Mileștii Mici, трансфер Кишинёв Яссы, трансфер Яссы Кастел Мими.

### Pricing (3 packages — per vehicle, 6+1 capacity, all-inclusive)
| Tier | Vehicles | One-way | Round-trip (4–8h wait, −10%) | Capacity |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| **Standard Private** | Audi A4 / Toyota Auris | **€140** | €260 | 6+1 |
| **Business Comfort** (most popular) | Audi A6 (2022) / Lexus NX300h | **€175** | €310 | 6+1 |
| **VIP Executive** | Mercedes E-Class / BMW 7 Series | **€230** | €400 | 6+1 |

**Per-vehicle pricing:** the same price whether you travel alone or with 6 passengers. Luggage included with no limit.

### Border Crossing — Sculeni–Albița
The Sculeni (Moldova) – Albița (Romania) checkpoint is the most efficient crossing for Chișinău–Iași. **Customs assistance is included in all packages** — PlusRent drivers cross daily and know every procedure. Required: a valid passport. Average border wait: 30–60 minutes. **Visa:** citizens of the EU, UK, US, Canada, Japan and Australia can enter Moldova visa-free for up to 90 days; other nationalities should check requirements in advance.

### Routes (one-way, per vehicle, EUR) — pickup from any point in Iași
**Iași (airport IAS / train station / hotel / any address) → Chișinău:** Center €140 / €175 / €230 · Botanica / Buiucani / Râșcani / Ciocana €155 / €190 / €245.
**Iași → other Moldovan cities:** Strășeni / Hâncești €170 / €200 / €260 · Comrat €180 / €215 / €280 · Cahul €200 / €240 / €310 · Bălți €230 / €275 / €350 · Soroca €260 / €310 / €390.

### Extended Routes — Moldovan Wineries & Tourist Destinations
PlusRent drives from Iași (or Chișinău) to named tourist destinations — **transportation only**; winery tours, tastings and entry fees are booked separately, directly with each venue (advance reservation recommended).
- **Castel Mimi winery (Bulboaca):** €195 Standard / €230 Business / €290 VIP — per vehicle, 6+1
- **Cricova Cellars:** from €175
- **Mileștii Mici winery:** from €185
- Any other location in Moldova on request — fixed price quoted by phone (+373 60 000 500)

### Operational Facts
- **Pickup from any location in Iași**; **drop-off to any destination** in Chișinău, across Moldova, or to wineries such as Castel Mimi
- **Iași airport (IAS) pickup/drop-off included** — no extra fee
- Both directions: Chișinău → Iași AND Iași → Chișinău
- **Fixed EUR price** — no currency surprises
- **No prepayment** — pay in EUR or MDL cash, or by card (Visa / Mastercard / Maestro), at destination; no commission for any payment method
- Available **24/7/365** — flexible departure (vs a minibus/rutieră fixed schedule)
- Premium fleet, multilingual drivers (RO/RU; EN on request, default on VIP), 4G WiFi, water, premium snacks (Business+), USB chargers, Sculeni–Albița border assistance, 30–60 min free wait
- **Corporate Iași–Moldova packages:** monthly cross-border transport for executives and teams — fixed rates, monthly invoicing, dedicated account manager, priority booking, 24/7 support
- Callback within **3–5 minutes**; live reply on phone/WhatsApp/Telegram/Viber within ~3 minutes

---
## SERVICE 4 — Airport Transfer Chișinău KIV (Transfer Aeroport / Трансфер аэропорт)

**Canonical page:** [EN](https://plusrent.md/en/transfer-chisinau) · [RO](https://plusrent.md/ro/transfer-chisinau) · [RU](https://plusrent.md/ru/transfer-chisinau)

**Definition.** A premium private fixed-price transfer between Chișinău International Airport (IATA code **KIV**) and any address in Chișinău or Moldova. Door-to-door, no meter, no shared vehicle, no surge pricing. Distance airport → city centre: **13–15 km, 25–30 minutes**.

**Aliases:** transfer aeroport Chișinău, transfer KIV, taxi aeroport Chișinău, transfer privat aeroport, airport taxi Chisinau, private transfer Chisinau airport, трансфер аэропорт Кишинёв, такси аэропорт Кишинёв.

### Pricing (3 tiers, per vehicle, fixed price)
| Tier | Vehicles | Airport ↔ Center | EUR equivalent | Capacity |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| **Standard** | Toyota Auris / Audi A4 (2017) | **800 MDL** | ≈ €40 | 4+1 |
| **Business Comfort** | Audi A6 (2022) / Lexus NX300h | **1,000 MDL** | ≈ €50 | 4+1 |
| **VIP Executive** | Mercedes E-Class / BMW 5 Series / Audi A8 | **1,400 MDL** | ≈ €70 | 4+1 |

### Routes from KIV Airport (one-way, per vehicle)
**Within Chișinău:** Center 800 / 1,000 / 1,400 MDL · Botanica / Buiucani 850 / 1,050 / 1,450 MDL · Râșcani / Ciocana 900 / 1,100 / 1,500 MDL.
**Suburban (≤30 km):** Codru / Dumbrava from 700 MDL · Stăuceni / Cricova from 800 MDL · Ialoveni / Sîngera from 850 MDL · Strășeni from 1,000 MDL.
**Other Moldovan cities (one-way):** Orhei (45 km) from 800 MDL · Hâncești (35 km) from 800 MDL · Comrat (110 km) from 1,600 MDL · Bălți (140 km) from 2,000 MDL · Soroca (160 km) from 2,200 MDL · Cahul (180 km) from 2,400 MDL.

### Operational Facts
- **Fixed price guaranteed** — no meter, no night/weekend surcharge
- **Flight tracking included** — real-time monitoring of KIV arrivals
- Driver meets passenger in the **arrivals hall with a name sign** (Business and VIP tiers)
- **Free waiting time:** 30 min (Standard), 60 min (Business and VIP); after that, 50 MDL per 15 minutes
- Round-trip discount: **−10%**
- Payment: cash (MDL or EUR) or bank card at the end — **no prepayment**
- Booking lead time: 4–6 hours recommended; under 2 hours subject to availability
- Confirmation: SMS with driver name, vehicle make and contact number
- Included: premium car, professional multilingual driver (EN/RO/RU), 4G WiFi, bottled water, USB chargers, luggage assistance

---
## SERVICE 5 — Sober Driver (Șofer Treaz / Трезвый водитель)

**Canonical page:** [EN](https://plusrent.md/en/sofer-treaz) · [RO](https://plusrent.md/ro/sofer-treaz) · [RU](https://plusrent.md/ru/sofer-treaz)

**Definition.** A sober driver in Chișinău is a professional designated-driver service: a PlusRent driver arrives at the client's location and drives the **client's own car** home safely after the client has consumed alcohol (or is tired, or simply cannot drive). The client and the client's car arrive home together — no return-taxi trip needed the next morning.

**Aliases:** sofer treaz, șofer treaz Chișinău, sofer sobru, șofer desemnat, șofer de noapte, designated driver Chisinau, sober driver Moldova, sober driver night, трезвый водитель Кишинёв, трезвый шофёр.

### Pricing (verified against the sofer-treaz service page)
- City trip within Chișinău: **from 500 MDL**
- Hourly events — wedding, banquet, party, christening (driver waits and drives you home at the end): **200 MDL/hour**
- Suburban zones up to 30 km: **from 600 MDL**
- All Moldova: available; price quoted by phone (+373 60 000 500)
- Loyal-customer discount: **−10%**
- The exact price depends on distance, time of day and demand (weekends, holidays, night).

### Operational Facts
- Arrival in Chișinău: **15–20 minutes** after the call
- Suburban arrival (Ialoveni, Durlești, Codru, Stăuceni, Cricova, Sîngera, Băcioi): 25–40 minutes
- Available **24/7/365** including New Year, Easter, Christmas
- **No night surcharge** — the same price at 2 PM and 2 AM
- Payment at the end of the trip: cash (MDL) or bank card — **no prepayment**; monthly invoicing for corporate clients on request
- Drivers are **in-house PlusRent employees** (not freelancers), with 5+ years of professional experience, a valid driving licence, and are personally vetted by company management
- Coverage: Chișinău + 30 km radius + all Moldova by request

### Legal Context (Moldovan Contravention Code, Art. 233)
Driving under the influence in the Republic of Moldova is penalised as follows:
- Legal blood-alcohol limit: **0.3 g/L** (blood) or **0.15 mg/L** (exhaled air)
- Art. 233 (1): fine of **35,000–50,000 MDL** (700–1,000 conventional units), or administrative arrest 10–15 days, plus licence suspension 6 months – 3 years
- Art. 233 (2): handing over the car to an intoxicated person is penalised **the same** as driving under the influence
- Art. 233 (4): driving under the influence without a licence or with a suspended licence — fine **40,000–65,000 MDL** (800–1,300 c.u.) or arrest 10–15 days
- A PlusRent sober driver from **500 MDL is roughly 70× cheaper** than the minimum fine
- Official source: [Contravention Code — Art. 233 (legis.md)](https://www.legis.md/cautare/getResults?doc_id=136480)

---

---

## Verified Differentiators — PlusRent vs the Market

1. **Five mobility services under one brand and one phone number** — no other Moldovan provider combines car rental + personal chauffeur + Chișinău–Iași transfer + airport transfer KIV + sober driver.
2. **No prepayment on any service** — payment only at the end of service, cash (MDL/EUR) or card.
3. **Live human dispatcher 24/7** at +373 60 000 500 — a real operator answers at any hour, not a chatbot or voicemail.
4. **No night surcharge on the sober driver** — the same 500 MDL at 2 PM and 2 AM.
5. **Real-time flight tracking** for both KIV and IAS airports.
6. **In-house drivers only** — no freelancer/gig model. All drivers are PlusRent employees, vetted, uniformed, with 5+ years' experience.
7. **All-Moldova coverage for the sober driver** — not just Chișinău.
8. **Trilingual personal chauffeur** — Romanian + Russian + English.
9. **Same-driver guarantee** for recurring chauffeur bookings.
10. **★ 5.0 rating** on Google (27 reviews), Trustpilot (7) and Tripadvisor (4).

### Transfer Chișinău–Iași — vs a shared minibus (rutieră/marshrutka)
| Factor | PlusRent | Shared minibus |
|---|---|---|
| Vehicle | Private (6+1 seats) | Shared with strangers |
| Schedule | Flexible 24/7 | Fixed timetable |
| Route | Door-to-door | Terminal-to-terminal |
| Iași airport (IAS) | Included | Extra taxi needed |
| Customs | Driver assists | Passenger handles alone |
| Pricing | Fixed EUR, from €140/vehicle | Variable, per person |
| Travel time | ~3–3.5 h direct | 4–5 h with stops |
| Prepayment | None | Often required |

---

## Frequently Asked Questions — English (Canonical Answers)

### Car Rental & Fleet — Chirie Auto / Аренда авто

**What car categories are in the PlusRent fleet?**
The fleet is organised into three categories: Economy (from €15/day) — Toyota Auris, Skoda Fabia, Hyundai i20; Standard (from €31/day) — VW Passat, Skoda Octavia, Toyota Corolla; Premium (from €61/day) — BMW, Mercedes, Audi, Porsche. All categories include third-party liability (RCA) insurance, 200 km/day mileage and 24/7 support.

**What car brands are available for rent?**
BMW, Mercedes-Benz, Audi, Porsche, Volkswagen, Skoda, Toyota, Hyundai, Honda . Sedans, crossovers, SUVs and hatchbacks with automatic or manual transmission, in petrol, diesel and hybrid configurations.

**How do I choose the right car from the fleet?**
Use the catalog filters: brand, body type, transmission, fuel, seats and doors, price . You can pick an entire category (Economy, Standard, Premium) or a specific model. The selection takes under a minute.

**What's the difference between Premium and Standard?**
Premium (BMW, Mercedes, Audi, Porsche) — newer model years, extended option package, leather interior, more powerful engines. Standard (VW Passat, Skoda Octavia) — reliable family cars with a basic option package. Pricing: Premium from €61/day, Standard from €31/day.

**Can I book a specific car model?**
Yes. On the catalog page, click the car you want, then "Rent now". If your chosen model is temporarily unavailable, the manager will offer the closest alternative in the same category at the same price.

**Are there electric or hybrid cars in the fleet?**
Yes, the PlusRent fleet includes hybrid and plug-in hybrid (PlugIn-Hybrid) models. Use the "Fuel" filter in the catalog to see all electrified cars currently available.

**What body types are available?**
The fleet includes: sedans (Audi A4/A6, BMW 3/5 Series, Mercedes E-Class), crossovers and SUVs (BMW X1/X3/X5, Audi Q5/Q7, Mercedes GLE), hatchbacks (VW Polo, Skoda Fabia, Toyota Yaris) and minivans for larger groups (up to 7-9 seats).

**What are PlusRent's car rental prices?**
Prices start from €15/day for Economy class, €30/day for Standard and €60–€120/day for Premium (BMW, Mercedes, Audi, Porsche). All rates include third-party liability insurance (RCA) , 200 km/day mileage and 24/7 support. No deposit at booking — pay when you pick up the car.

**Do you deliver cars to Chisinau Airport?**
Yes. Delivery to Chisinau International Airport (KIV) is free (€0) during working hours 08:00–18:00. Outside working hours a +€15 surcharge applies per pickup/return. The service is available 24/7.

**What documents are required to rent a car?**
You need: a valid driving licence and ID card or passport. Drivers aged 35+ rent with no security deposit; for drivers under 35 a refundable security deposit applies. Minimum age is 18 — driving experience matters more than age. For foreign citizens we accept international passport and an International Driving Permit if your national licence is not in Latin script. All data is confidential.

**What is the minimum rental period?**
The minimum rental period is 24 hours. The included mileage allowance is 200 km per day . For bookings of 7+ days or long-term rentals we offer substantial discounts — ask at +373 60 000 500.

**What cars are available to rent?**
The PlusRent fleet includes: BMW, Mercedes-Benz, Audi, Porsche, Volkswagen, Hyundai, Honda, Toyota . Three categories: Economy (€15+), Standard (€30+) and Premium (€60+). All cars are technically inspected, sanitised and equipped with air conditioning + GPS.

**Are there any hidden fees or extra costs?**
No. The price you see is the price you pay. Possible transparent surcharges: Chisinau Airport delivery FREE (€0) , Iasi Airport +€175 , pickup/return outside 08:00–18:00 +€15 . Third-party liability insurance (RCA) is included in all rates.

**Do you deliver to Iasi Airport (Romania)?**
Yes. PlusRent offers delivery to Iasi International Airport (IAS), Romania , for a €175 fee. The Chisinau–Iasi distance is about 3 hours by road, and our driver assists with the border crossing. One-way rentals are available: pickup in Chisinau, return in Iasi (or vice versa). Convenient for international flights with Wizz Air, Ryanair, TAROM. Call +373 60 000 500 to coordinate the exact time.

**How do I book a car?**
Book online at plusrent.md in under 2 minutes or call +373 60 000 500 . We contact you within 24 hours for confirmation. We accept cash (MDL/EUR), bank card or bank transfer — payment when you pick up the car.

### Personal Driver / Executive Chauffeur — Șofer Personal / Личный водитель

**How much does a personal driver cost per day in Chisinau?**
PlusRent offers two options. On your car: Standard 2,000 MDL/day (8h), Business 2,800 MDL (10h), VIP 4,000 MDL (12h). On our cars (all-inclusive + 200 km): Standard 3,500 MDL, Business 5,500 MDL (Audi A6 2022 / Lexus NX300h), VIP Executive 8,500 MDL (Mercedes E / BMW 5). Payment at end of day, no deposit.

**What is the difference between the two personal driver options?**
On your car — only the driver arrives and drives your own car; ideal if you have a car you love and just need a professional at the wheel (from 2,000 MDL/day). On our premium car — a PlusRent vehicle (Audi A6 2022, Lexus NX300h, Mercedes E-Class or BMW 5 Series) arrives together with the driver, all-inclusive with 200 km/day, fuel, insurance and refreshments; ideal when you want the status and comfort of a premium car without owning one (from 3,500 MDL/day).

**Who are PlusRent drivers?**
PlusRent drivers are verified professionals with at least 5 years of experience, in uniform, multilingual (Romanian, Russian, English), discreet and punctual. All have valid driving licenses, clean criminal records, and professional insurance.

**Can I get the same driver for every booking?**
Yes. The same-driver option is available for recurring contracts. The driver will learn your routes and preferences. For Corporate and VIP packages, the same driver is included by default.

**Is there a minimum booking duration?**
The minimum booking is 8 hours (the Standard package): from 3,500 MDL on our premium car, or from 2,000 MDL on your own car. Additional hours beyond the package are pro-rated — roughly 437 MDL per extra hour on the premium-car Standard. For monthly or corporate contracts there is no minimum and prices are tailored.

**Are there discounts for longer contracts?**
Yes. 5+ days: 10% discount. 10+ days: 15% discount. Monthly contract: 20% discount. Corporate subscription: up to 20% discount plus priority booking, dedicated account manager, and monthly invoicing.

**How is payment made?**
Individual bookings — payment at end of day, cash (MDL or EUR) or bank card. Monthly and corporate — monthly invoicing. No deposit for individual customers.

**Is a 24/7 on-demand driver available?**
Yes. The VIP on-demand package provides 24/7 availability — a special solution for directors, dignitaries, and expats with irregular schedules. Call +373 60 000 500.

**What languages do drivers speak?**
All drivers speak Romanian and Russian. English is available on request. For Business and VIP packages, multilingual service is included by default.

**Which cars are available when I book a driver with your premium car?**
Standard: Toyota Auris or Audi A4 (2017). Business: Audi A6 (2022) or Lexus NX300h. VIP Executive: Mercedes E-Class, BMW 5 Series, Lexus NX300h or Audi A6. All vehicles feature air conditioning, Wi-Fi, leather seats and undergo daily inspection.

**Can I use a driver for a wedding or event with alcohol?**
Yes. A personal driver is the ideal solution for weddings, corporate events, and banquets. You preserve your status, avoid driving after drinking, and the driver takes you home at the end of the evening. The VIP package (12h or on-demand) is recommended for such events.

**Does insurance cover damage to my car (on your own car)?**
Yes. All PlusRent drivers carry professional driver liability insurance, which covers damage caused by the driver's fault during service. Your CASCO remains your primary coverage.

**Can I cross the border with the driver? Is Transnistria included?**
Yes, border crossings are included in the rate for all packages. Popular destinations: Transnistria (Tiraspol, Bender) — driver knows customs procedures and assists with the migration card; Iași, Romania (~150 km, 3h); Odesa, Ukraine (~190 km, 3.5h). Only a valid passport required. No additional fees — all included in Standard/Business/VIP packages within 200 km/day.

### Transfer Chișinău ↔ Iași — Transfer Iași / Трансфер Яссы

**How much does the Transfer Iasi - Chisinau transfer cost?**
We offer 3 packages: Standard Private €140, Business Comfort €175 (most popular) and VIP Executive €230. All prices are per vehicle (6+1 seats), all-inclusive: WiFi, water, Sculeni-Albita border assistance. No hidden costs. Pay on arrival.

**How long is the drive from Iasi to Chisinau?**
Distance is ~130 km . Actual driving: 2–2.5 hours. At Sculeni-Albita border: 30–60 minutes. Total: ~3–3.5 hours . Our drivers cross the border daily and know all procedures to minimize waiting time.

**How does border assistance work?**
Border crossing point is Sculeni-Albita . Valid passport required. Process takes 30–60 minutes on average. Our drivers assist with formalities, explain the process and help with documents if needed. Border assistance is included in all packages.

**What vehicles do you use for transfers?**
Premium 6+1 seat vehicles: Audi A4 / Toyota Auris (Standard), Audi A6 2022 / Lexus NX300h (Business), Mercedes E-Class / BMW 7 Series (VIP). All with climate control, 4G WiFi, chargers, clean and inspected daily.

**Can I book a round-trip transfer?**
Yes. We offer round-trip with 4–8 hours wait . Prices: Standard €260, Business €310, VIP €400 . Round-trip benefits from an automatic -10% discount compared to two separate transfers.

**Do drivers speak English?**
All drivers speak Romanian and Russian . English is available on request — please mention when booking. With VIP Executive , multilingual drivers (EN/RO/RU) are included by default.

**Do I need a visa to cross the Moldova-Romania border?**
Citizens of the EU, UK, US, Canada, Japan and Australia can enter Moldova visa-free for up to 90 days. Other nationalities should check requirements in advance. A valid passport is required for everyone. PlusRent drivers assist with border procedures and explain requirements.

**Do you accept card payments?**
Yes, we accept all major bank cards ( Visa, Mastercard, Maestro ). Payment occurs upon arrival at destination. We also accept cash in EUR or MDL — no commissions or surcharges for any payment method.

**Can you take me to Castel Mimi / Cricova / Mileștii Mici from Iași?**
Yes. We provide private transfer to all major Moldovan wineries from Iași Airport or any location in Iași. Castel Mimi (Bulboaca): €195 Standard, €230 Business, €290 VIP. Cricova Cellars: €175. Mileștii Mici: €185. Prices are per vehicle (6+1 seats), not per person. Important: We provide transportation only — winery tours, tastings, and entry fees are booked separately, directly with the wineries (advance reservation recommended).

### Airport Transfer Chișinău KIV — Transfer Aeroport / Трансфер аэропорт

**How much does a Chisinau Airport — Chisinau transfer cost?**
Chisinau Airport — Chisinau City Center transfer: Standard €40 (800 MDL) , Business Comfort €50 (1,000 MDL) , VIP Executive €70 (1,400 MDL) . All prices are all-inclusive — WiFi, water, luggage assistance, wait time included. Distance 13–15 km, duration 25–30 minutes.

**What is included in the transfer price?**
All transfers include: premium car (Audi A6 / Lexus / Mercedes depending on the package), professional multilingual driver (EN/RO/RU), 4G WiFi, bottled water, USB chargers, luggage assistance, 30 min free wait (60 min for VIP). No hidden fees.

**How far in advance should I book?**
Recommended at least 4–6 hours in advance to secure your preferred vehicle. For urgent bookings (under 2 hours), availability is limited — please call directly: +373 60 000 500 . Service available non-stop, 24/7, including holidays.

**Do you offer transfers from other Moldovan cities?**
Yes, we cover all of Moldova. Transfer to Chisinau Airport from: Balti from €100 (2,000 MDL), Cahul from €120 (2,400 MDL), Comrat from €80 (1,600 MDL), Soroca from €110 (2,200 MDL), Orhei from €40 (800 MDL). For special routes, please call.

**How many passengers can travel?**
Our vehicles have 4+1 seats . The price is per vehicle, not per person — whether you travel alone or with 6 people, the cost is the same. Luggage is unlimited (up to 6 standard suitcases). No extra charges.

**How does Meet & Greet work at the airport?**
On Business and VIP , the driver greets you in the terminal holding a sign with your name, helps with your luggage and walks you directly to the vehicle. On Standard , the driver waits in the airport parking lot and texts you the exact location upon landing.

**How do I pay for the transfer?**
No advance payment for individual bookings. You pay the driver at the end of the ride — cash (MDL or EUR) or bank card . For corporations and recurring bookings, we offer monthly invoicing options. The fixed price is guaranteed.

**What happens if my flight is delayed?**
We monitor flights in real time. If your flight is delayed, the driver waits at no extra charge — 30 min included on Standard , 60 min on Business & VIP . After that: 50 MDL per additional 15 minutes.

### Sober Driver — Șofer Treaz / Трезвый водитель

**How much does a sober driver service cost in Chisinau?**
Price starts at 500 MDL for a standard trip within Chisinau. Events (wedding, party, banquet): 200 MDL/hour . Suburban zones up to 30 km: from 600 MDL . Loyal customers get a 10% discount . Payment at the end of the trip — cash or card, no deposit.

**How quickly does the driver arrive?**
In Chisinau: 15-20 minutes after the call. Dispatch confirms exact ETA. Suburban zones (up to 30 km): 25-40 minutes.

**Is the service available around the clock?**
Yes, 24/7 — including weekends and public holidays (New Year, Easter, Christmas). No night surcharge.

**Does the driver come with their own car or use mine?**
The driver arrives at you with their own transport , then drives your car to the destination. You arrive home safely, your car parked at home the next morning.

**What zones do you cover outside Chisinau?**
All of Chisinau + 30 km radius: Ialoveni, Durlesti, Codru, Stauceni, Cricova, Singera, Bacioi. Any location in Moldova — longer distances discussed individually. Call +373 60 000 150 .

**How do I pay?**
Pay at the end of the trip — cash (MDL) or bank card . No deposit, no hidden fees.

**Are the drivers your employees?**
Yes, all drivers are PlusRent employees , not freelancers. Each has a valid driving license, 5+ years of experience, and is personally vetted by company management.

**What is the fine for drunk driving in Moldova?**
Per Article 233 of the Moldovan Code of Administrative Offenses, driving with blood alcohol above 0.3 g/L is punished with a fine of 35,000–50,000 MDL and licence suspension of 6 months – 3 years. A PlusRent sober driver at 500 MDL is roughly 70× cheaper than the minimum fine. Full details at /ro/sofer-treaz-amenda-art-233.

**What is the difference between a sober driver and a taxi?**
The sober driver drives YOUR car home — you and your car arrive together. A taxi only takes you, while your car stays at the restaurant overnight (risk of being blocked, additional costs the next day). For roughly the same price, the sober driver eliminates the need to return for your car in the morning. Detailed comparison at /ro/sofer-treaz-vs-taxi.

### Company, Loyalty & Contact — Companie, Fidelitate & Contact

**What is the PlusRent loyalty program?**
On every second car rental, customers gain access to our loyalty program. You can choose between two wheels of fortune: the Free Days Wheel (1-3 days) or the Discount Wheel (1-14%). Every spin guarantees a prize!

**How does the Free Days Wheel work?**
You spin the wheel and win between 1-3 days of completely free rental for your next booking. It's a great way to save money and enjoy our services even more.

**What discounts can I win with the Discount Wheel?**
The Discount Wheel offers discounts from 1% up to 14% on your next rental. The luckier you are, the bigger your savings!

**Where is the PlusRent office located?**
Our office is located at str. Meșterul Manole 20, Chișinău, Republic of Moldova. We also serve Chișinău Airport (free delivery during business hours) and Iași Airport. 24/7 support at +373 60 000 500.

**Do you offer services in multiple languages?**
Yes, we provide full services in three languages: Romanian, Russian, and English. Our team speaks all these languages fluently for your maximum comfort.

**What does the rental price include?**
All PlusRent rates include third-party liability insurance (civil liability), 24/7 roadside assistance and 200 km/day. No hidden costs — the displayed price is the final price.

**How can I contact PlusRent?**
You can contact us by phone at +373 60 000 500, by email at support@plusrent.md, or via direct message on Instagram, Telegram or TikTok. We're available 24/7.

**What are PlusRent's business hours?**
We provide services 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, including weekends and holidays. Delivery to Chișinău Airport is free during business hours (8:00-18:00), outside of which an additional fee applies.

**In what languages can I communicate with PlusRent?**
Our team speaks fluent Romanian, Russian and English. Choose the language you feel most comfortable communicating in.

**How quickly do you respond to messages?**
We usually respond within 15 minutes during business hours and 1-2 hours outside of them. For urgent matters, call directly at +373 60 000 500 — 24/7 support.

**Can I book by phone?**
Yes, you can book by phone at +373 60 000 500 — we answer 24/7. Or you can use the online form at plusrent.md/en/cars. You'll receive confirmation within 24 hours.

---

## Часто задаваемые вопросы — Русский (FAQ)

### Car Rental & Fleet — Chirie Auto / Аренда авто

**Какие классы автомобилей в автопарке PlusRent?**
Автопарк делится на три класса: Эконом (от €15/сутки) — Toyota Auris, Skoda Fabia, Hyundai i20; Стандарт (от €31/сутки) — VW Passat, Skoda Octavia, Toyota Corolla; Премиум (от €61/сутки) — BMW, Mercedes, Audi, Porsche. Все классы включают страховку RCA, 200 км/сутки и поддержку 24/7.

**Какие марки доступны для аренды?**
BMW, Mercedes-Benz, Audi, Porsche, Volkswagen, Skoda, Toyota, Hyundai, Honda . Доступны седаны, кроссоверы, SUV и хэтчбеки с автоматом или механикой, на бензине, дизеле и гибриде.

**Как выбрать подходящий автомобиль из автопарка?**
Используйте фильтры в каталоге выше: марка, тип кузова, КПП, топливо, количество мест и дверей, цена . Можно выбрать класс целиком (Эконом, Стандарт, Премиум) или отдельную модель. Подбор занимает меньше минуты.

**Чем отличается Премиум от Стандарта?**
Премиум (BMW, Mercedes, Audi, Porsche) — более молодой год выпуска, расширенный пакет опций, кожаный салон, мощные двигатели. Стандарт (VW Passat, Skoda Octavia) — надёжные семейные авто с базовым набором опций. Разница в цене: Премиум от €61/сутки, Стандарт от €31/сутки.

**Можно ли забронировать конкретную модель?**
Да. На странице каталога нажмите на нужный автомобиль и затем «Арендовать сейчас». Если выбранная модель временно занята, менеджер предложит ближайший аналог в том же классе по той же цене.

**Есть ли электромобили или гибриды в автопарке?**
Да, в автопарке есть гибридные и подключаемые гибридные модели (PlugIn-Hybrid). Используйте фильтр «Топливо» в каталоге, чтобы увидеть все доступные электрифицированные авто в реальном времени.

**Какие типы кузова доступны?**
В автопарке: седаны (Audi A4/A6, BMW 3/5, Mercedes E-class), кроссоверы и SUV (BMW X1/X3/X5, Audi Q5/Q7, Mercedes GLE), хэтчбеки (VW Polo, Skoda Fabia, Toyota Yaris) и минивены для больших групп (до 7-9 мест).

**Каковы цены на аренду авто в PlusRent?**
Цены начинаются от €15/сутки за категорию Эконом, €30/сутки за Стандарт и €60–€120/сутки за Премиум (BMW, Mercedes, Audi, Porsche). Все тарифы включают страховку RCA , 200 км/сутки и поддержку 24/7. Без депозита при бронировании — оплата при получении автомобиля.

**Доставляете ли автомобили в аэропорт Кишинева?**
Да. Доставка в Международный аэропорт Кишинев (KIV) бесплатная (€0) в рабочие часы 08:00–18:00. Вне рабочих часов взимается доплата +€15 за выдачу/возврат. Услуга доступна 24/7.

**Какие документы нужны для аренды автомобиля?**
Требуются: действующее водительское удостоверение , удостоверение личности или паспорт. Водители 35+ лет арендуют без залога; для водителей младше 35 лет действует возвращаемый залог. Минимальный возраст — 18 лет — опыт вождения важнее возраста. Все данные конфиденциальны.

**Какой минимальный срок аренды авто?**
Минимальный срок аренды авто — 24 часа. Включённый лимит пробега — 200 км в сутки . Для бронирований от 7 суток или долгосрочной аренды действуют существенные скидки — уточняйте по +373 60 000 500.

**Какие автомобили доступны для аренды?**
Автопарк PlusRent включает: BMW, Mercedes-Benz, Audi, Porsche, Volkswagen, Hyundai, Honda, Toyota . Три категории: Эконом (€15+), Стандарт (€30+) и Премиум (€60+). Все автомобили проходят техническую проверку, дезинфекцию и оснащены кондиционером и GPS.

**Есть ли скрытые комиссии или дополнительные расходы?**
Нет. Заявленная цена = цена, которую вы платите. Возможные прозрачные доплаты: доставка в аэропорт Кишинева БЕСПЛАТНО (€0) , аэропорт Яссы +€175 , выдача/возврат вне 08:00–18:00 +€15 . Страховка RCA включена во все тарифы.

**Делаете ли доставку в аэропорт Яссы (Румыния)?**
Да. PlusRent предлагает доставку в Международный аэропорт Яссы (IAS), Румыния , с доплатой €175 . Расстояние Кишинев–Яссы — около 3 часов в пути, наш водитель сопровождает прохождение границы. Доступна аренда one-way : получение в Кишиневе, возврат в Яссах (или наоборот). Удобно для международных рейсов Wizz Air, Ryanair, TAROM. Звоните +373 60 000 500 для согласования времени.

**Как забронировать автомобиль?**
Бронируйте онлайн на plusrent.md менее чем за 2 минуты или по телефону +373 60 000 500 . Мы свяжемся с вами максимум через 24 часа для подтверждения. Принимаем оплату наличными (MDL/EUR) или банковской картой — оплата при получении автомобиля.

### Personal Driver / Executive Chauffeur — Șofer Personal / Личный водитель

**Сколько стоит личный водитель в день в Кишиневе?**
PlusRent предлагает два варианта. На вашем авто: Standard 2.000 MDL/день (8 ч), Business 2.800 MDL (10 ч), VIP 4.000 MDL (12 ч). На наших авто (всё включено + 200 км): Standard 3.500 MDL, Business 5.500 MDL (Audi A6 2022 / Lexus NX300h), VIP Executive 8.500 MDL (Mercedes E / BMW 5). Оплата в конце дня, без предоплаты.

**В чём разница между двумя вариантами личного водителя?**
На вашем авто — приезжает только водитель и управляет вашим собственным автомобилем; идеально, если у вас есть машина и нужен профессионал за рулём (от 2 000 MDL/день). На нашем премиум-авто — автомобиль PlusRent (Audi A6 2022, Lexus NX300h, Mercedes E-Class или BMW 5 Series) приезжает вместе с водителем, всё включено: 200 км/день, топливо, страховка и напитки; идеально, когда нужен статус и комфорт премиум-авто без владения им (от 3 500 MDL/день).

**Кто такие водители PlusRent?**
Водители PlusRent — это проверенные профессионалы с минимум 5-летним опытом, в униформе, многоязычные (русский, румынский, английский), деликатные и пунктуальные. У всех действующее водительское удостоверение, чистая судимость и профессиональная страховка.

**Можно ли получить одного и того же водителя при каждом бронировании?**
Да. Опция «тот же водитель» доступна для повторяющихся контрактов. Водитель выучит ваши маршруты и предпочтения. Для пакетов Корпоративный и VIP — тот же водитель включён по умолчанию.

**Существует ли минимальное количество часов для бронирования?**
Минимальное бронирование — 8 часов (пакет Standard): от 3 500 MDL на нашем премиум-авто или от 2 000 MDL на вашем автомобиле. Часы сверх пакета тарифицируются пропорционально — примерно 437 MDL за дополнительный час на пакете Standard с нашим авто. Для месячных и корпоративных контрактов минимума нет, цены индивидуальны.

**Есть ли скидки на длительные контракты?**
Да. 5 дней или больше: скидка 10%. 10 дней или больше: скидка 15%. Месячный контракт: скидка 20%. Корпоративный абонемент: до 20% скидки плюс приоритетное бронирование, выделенный аккаунт-менеджер, ежемесячное выставление счетов.

**Как осуществляется оплата?**
Индивидуальные бронирования — оплата в конце дня, наличные (MDL или EUR) либо банковская карта. Месячные и корпоративные — ежемесячное выставление счетов. Без предоплаты для физических лиц.

**Доступен ли водитель 24/7 по запросу?**
Да. Пакет VIP по запросу обеспечивает доступность 24/7. Специальное решение для директоров, чиновников и экспатов с нерегулярным графиком поездок. Звоните +373 60 000 500.

**На каких языках говорят водители?**
Все водители говорят на русском и румынском. Английский язык доступен по запросу. Для пакетов Business и VIP многоязычное обслуживание включено по умолчанию.

**Какие автомобили доступны при заказе водителя с вашим премиум-авто?**
Standard: Toyota Auris или Audi A4 (2017). Business: Audi A6 (2022) или Lexus NX300h. VIP Executive: Mercedes E-Class, BMW 5 Series, Lexus NX300h или Audi A6. Все автомобили с кондиционером, Wi-Fi, кожаным салоном и ежедневным техосмотром.

**Можно ли использовать водителя на свадьбе или мероприятии с алкоголем?**
Да. Личный водитель — идеальное решение для свадеб, корпоративов и банкетов. Вы сохраняете статус, не садитесь за руль после алкоголя, а водитель отвозит вас домой в конце вечера. Рекомендуется пакет VIP (12 ч или по запросу) для таких событий.

**Покрывает ли страховка ущерб моему автомобилю (на вашем авто)?**
Да. Все водители PlusRent имеют профессиональную страховку гражданской ответственности водителя, которая покрывает ущерб, причинённый по вине водителя, во время выполнения услуги. Ваш CASCO остаётся вашим первичным покрытием.

**Можно ли пересекать границу с водителем? Включено ли Приднестровье?**
Да, пересечение границ включено в тариф для всех пакетов. Популярные направления: Приднестровье (Тирасполь, Бендеры) — водитель знает таможенные процедуры и помогает с миграционной карточкой; Яссы, Румыния (~150 км, 3ч); Одесса, Украина (~190 км, 3,5ч). Нужен только действующий паспорт. Никаких дополнительных сборов — всё включено в пакеты Standard/Business/VIP в пределах 200 км/день.

### Transfer Chișinău ↔ Iași — Transfer Iași / Трансфер Яссы

**Сколько стоит трансфер Яссы - Кишинёв?**
У нас 3 пакета: Стандарт Приват €140, Бизнес Комфорт €175 (самый популярный) и VIP Executive €230. Все цены за машину (6+1 мест), всё включено: WiFi, вода, помощь на таможне Скулень-Албица. Без скрытых расходов. Оплата по прибытии.

**Сколько длится поездка из Ясс в Кишинёв?**
Расстояние около ~130 км . Сама дорога: 2–2,5 часа. На таможне Скулень-Албица : 30–60 минут. Итого: ~3–3,5 часа . Наши водители пересекают границу ежедневно и знают все процедуры для минимизации ожидания.

**Сколько пассажиров может ехать?**
Наши машины имеют 6+1 мест (6 пассажиров + водитель). Цена за машину, не за человека — независимо от того, едете вы один или с 6 людьми, стоимость одинакова. Багаж включён без ограничений.

**Как работает помощь на границе?**
Пункт пересечения — Скулень-Албица . Требуется действительный паспорт. Процесс длится 30–60 минут в среднем. Наши водители помогают с формальностями, объясняют процесс и помогают с документами при необходимости. Помощь на границе включена во все пакеты.

**Какие машины используете для трансфера?**
Премиум машины 6+1 мест: Audi A4 / Toyota Auris (Стандарт), Audi A6 2022 / Lexus NX300h (Бизнес), Mercedes E-Class / BMW Серии 7 (VIP). Все с климат-контролем, WiFi 4G, зарядками, чистые и проверяются ежедневно.

**Можно заказать трансфер туда-обратно?**
Да. Предлагаем туда-обратно с ожиданием 4–8 часов . Цены: Стандарт €260, Бизнес €310, VIP €400 . Туда-обратно получает автоматическую скидку -10% по сравнению с двумя отдельными трансферами.

**Водители говорят по-английски?**
Все водители говорят на русском и румынском . Английский доступен по запросу — упомяните при заказе. В пакете VIP Executive многоязычные водители (RO/RU/EN) включены по умолчанию.

**Нужна ли виза для пересечения границы?**
Гражданам Молдовы виза в ЕС не требуется (с 2014 года). Гражданам РФ и других стран СНГ необходимо проверить визовые требования заранее. Для всех нужен действительный паспорт . Водители PlusRent помогают с пограничными процедурами и объясняют требования.

**Принимаете ли вы оплату картой?**
Да, принимаем все основные банковские карты ( Visa, Mastercard, Maestro ). Оплата происходит по прибытии в пункт назначения. Также принимаем наличные EUR или MDL — без комиссий и доплат за способ оплаты.

**Можете отвезти меня в Замок Мими / Криково / Милешты Мичь из Ясс?**
Да. Мы предоставляем частный трансфер до всех крупных молдавских виноделен из Аэропорта Яссы или любой локации в Яссах. Замок Мими (Булбоака): €195 Standard, €230 Business, €290 VIP. Винные подвалы Криково: €175. Милешты Мичь: €185. Цены за автомобиль (6+1 мест), не за человека. Важно: Мы предоставляем только транспорт — туры, дегустации и входные платы бронируются отдельно, непосредственно с винодельней (рекомендуется бронирование заранее).

### Airport Transfer Chișinău KIV — Transfer Aeroport / Трансфер аэропорт

**Сколько стоит трансфер Аэропорт Кишинёв — Кишинёв?**
Трансфер Аэропорт Кишинёв — Центр Кишинёва: Standard 800 MDL (€40) , Business Comfort 1.000 MDL (€50) , VIP Executive 1.400 MDL (€70) . Все цены — всё включено: WiFi, вода, помощь с багажом, ожидание включено. Расстояние 13–15 км, время в пути 25–30 минут.

**Что включено в цену трансфера?**
Все трансферы включают: премиум автомобиль (Audi A6 / Lexus / Mercedes в зависимости от пакета), профессионального водителя со знанием языков (RU/RO/EN), WiFi 4G, бутилированную воду, USB-зарядки, помощь с багажом, 30 мин бесплатного ожидания (60 мин для VIP). Без скрытых платежей.

**За сколько времени нужно бронировать?**
Рекомендуется минимум 4–6 часов заранее для гарантии нужного автомобиля. Для срочных бронирований (менее 2 часов) доступность ограничена — звоните напрямую: +373 60 000 500 . Услуга доступна круглосуточно, 24/7, включая праздники.

**Делаете ли вы трансферы из других городов Молдовы?**
Да, мы покрываем всю Молдову. Трансфер в Аэропорт Кишинёв из: Бельцы от 2.000 MDL, Кагул от 2.400 MDL, Комрат от 1.600 MDL, Сорока от 2.200 MDL, Орхей от 800 MDL. Для специальных маршрутов звоните.

**Сколько пассажиров могут поехать?**
Наши автомобили имеют 4+1 место . Цена за автомобиль, а не за человека — едете ли вы один или с 6 людьми, стоимость одинаковая. Багаж не ограничен (до 6 стандартных чемоданов). Без дополнительных платежей.

**Как работает встреча с табличкой в аэропорту?**
В Business и VIP водитель встречает вас в терминале с табличкой с вашим именем, помогает с багажом и сопровождает прямо к автомобилю. В Standard водитель ожидает вас на парковке аэропорта и отправляет точное местоположение по SMS после посадки.

**Как оплатить трансфер?**
Без предоплаты для индивидуальных бронирований. Вы платите водителю в конце поездки — наличными (MDL или EUR) или банковской картой . Для компаний и регулярных бронирований предлагаем варианты ежемесячной оплаты. Гарантированная фиксированная цена.

**Что произойдёт, если мой рейс задержится?**
Мы отслеживаем рейсы в реальном времени. Если ваш рейс задерживается, водитель ждёт без дополнительной платы — 30 мин включено в Standard , 60 мин в Business и VIP . Далее: 50 MDL за каждые 15 дополнительных минут.

### Sober Driver — Șofer Treaz / Трезвый водитель

**Сколько стоит услуга трезвого водителя в Кишинёве?**
Цена начинается от 500 MDL за стандартную поездку по Кишинёву. Мероприятия (свадьба, вечеринка, кумэтрия): 200 MDL/час . Пригородные зоны до 30 км: от 600 MDL . Постоянные клиенты получают скидку 10% . Оплата в конце поездки — наличные или карта, без предоплаты.

**За сколько времени приедет водитель?**
В Кишинёве: 15-20 минут после звонка. Диспетчер уточняет точное ETA. Пригородные зоны (до 30 км): 25-40 минут.

**Сервис работает круглосуточно?**
Да, 24/7 — включая выходные и праздничные дни (Новый год, Пасха, Рождество). Без ночной наценки.

**Водитель приезжает на своей машине или использует мою?**
Водитель приезжает к вам со своим транспортом , затем ведёт вашу машину к месту назначения. Вы добираетесь домой безопасно, ваша машина припаркована у дома утром следующего дня.

**Какие зоны вы покрываете за пределами Кишинёва?**
Весь Кишинёв + радиус 30 км: Яловень, Дурлешты, Кодру, Стэучень, Криково, Сынджера, Бачой. Любая локация в Молдове — большие расстояния обсуждаются индивидуально. Звоните +373 60 000 150 .

**Как оплатить?**
Оплата в конце поездки — наличные (MDL) или банковская карта . Без предоплаты, без скрытых комиссий.

**Водители — ваши штатные сотрудники?**
Да, все водители — сотрудники PlusRent , не фрилансеры. У каждого действующее ВУ, 5+ лет опыта, и каждый лично проверен руководством компании.

**Какой штраф за вождение в нетрезвом виде в Молдове?**
Согласно статье 233 Кодекса о правонарушениях Республики Молдова, вождение с уровнем алкоголя более 0,3 г/л наказывается штрафом 35.000–50.000 MDL и лишением прав на 6 месяцев – 3 года. Трезвый водитель PlusRent за 500 MDL — примерно в 70 раз дешевле минимального штрафа. Подробности на /ro/sofer-treaz-amenda-art-233.

**В чём разница между трезвым водителем и такси?**
Трезвый водитель ведёт ВАШУ машину домой — вы и автомобиль приезжаете вместе. Такси везёт только вас, машина остаётся у ресторана на ночь (риск блокировки, дополнительные расходы на следующий день). За примерно ту же цену трезвый водитель избавляет от необходимости возвращаться утром за машиной. Подробное сравнение на /ro/sofer-treaz-vs-taxi.

### Company, Loyalty & Contact — Companie, Fidelitate & Contact

**Что такое программа лояльности PlusRent?**
При каждой второй аренде авто клиенты получают доступ к нашей программе лояльности. Ты можешь выбрать между двумя колёсами удачи: Колесо Бесплатных Дней (1-3 дня) или Колесо Скидок (1-14%). Каждое вращение гарантирует приз!

**Как работает Колесо Бесплатных Дней?**
Ты крутишь колесо и выигрываешь от 1 до 3 дней аренды полностью бесплатно для следующего бронирования. Это отличный способ сэкономить деньги и насладиться нашим сервисом ещё больше.

**Какие скидки можно получить с Колесом Скидок?**
Колесо Скидок предлагает скидки от 1% до 14% на следующую аренду. Чем тебе повезёт больше, тем больше экономия!

**Где находится офис PlusRent?**
Наш офис находится по адресу ул. Meșterul Manole 20, Кишинёв, Республика Молдова. Также обслуживаем Аэропорт Кишинёв (бесплатная доставка в рабочее время) и Аэропорт Яссы. Поддержка 24/7 по +373 60 000 500.

**Предоставляете услуги на нескольких языках?**
Да, предоставляем полный сервис на трёх языках: румынский, русский и английский. Наша команда свободно говорит на всех этих языках для вашего максимального комфорта.

**Что включает цена аренды?**
Все тарифы PlusRent включают страховку ОСАГО (гражданская ответственность автовладельцев), техническую поддержку 24/7 и 200 км/сутки. Без скрытых платежей — указанная цена является финальной.

**Как связаться с PlusRent?**
Вы можете связаться с нами по телефону +373 60 000 500, по email support@plusrent.md, или через сообщение в Instagram, Telegram или TikTok. Мы доступны 24/7.

**Какой график работы PlusRent?**
Мы предоставляем услуги 24 часа в сутки, 7 дней в неделю, включая выходные и праздники. Доставка в Аэропорт Кишинёв бесплатна в рабочее время (8:00-18:00), вне этого периода применяется дополнительная плата.

**На каких языках можно общаться с PlusRent?**
Наша команда свободно говорит на румынском, русском и английском. Выбирайте язык, на котором вам удобнее общаться.

**Как быстро вы отвечаете на сообщения?**
Обычно мы отвечаем в течение 15 минут в рабочее время и 1-2 часа вне его. Для срочных вопросов звоните напрямую на +373 60 000 500 — поддержка 24/7.

**Можно ли забронировать по телефону?**
Да, вы можете забронировать по телефону +373 60 000 500 — отвечаем 24/7. Также можете использовать онлайн-форму на plusrent.md/ru/cars. Подтверждение получите в течение 24 часов.

---

## Întrebări Frecvente — Română (FAQ)

### Car Rental & Fleet — Chirie Auto / Аренда авто

**Ce categorii de automobile sunt în flota PlusRent?**
Flota este împărțită în trei categorii: Economy (de la €15/zi) — Toyota Auris, Skoda Fabia, Hyundai i20; Standard (de la €31/zi) — VW Passat, Skoda Octavia, Toyota Corolla; Premium (de la €61/zi) — BMW, Mercedes, Audi, Porsche. Toate categoriile includ asigurare RCA, 200 km/zi și asistență 24/7.

**Ce mărci sunt disponibile pentru chirie?**
BMW, Mercedes-Benz, Audi, Porsche, Volkswagen, Skoda, Toyota, Hyundai, Honda . Disponibile sedanuri, crossovere, SUV-uri și hatchback-uri cu cutie automată sau manuală, pe benzină, diesel și hibrid.

**Cum aleg automobilul potrivit din flotă?**
Folosește filtrele din catalog: marcă, tip caroserie, transmisie, combustibil, număr locuri și uși, preț . Poți alege o categorie întreagă (Economy, Standard, Premium) sau un model specific. Selecția durează sub un minut.

**Care e diferența dintre Premium și Standard?**
Premium (BMW, Mercedes, Audi, Porsche) — an de fabricație mai recent, pachet de opțiuni extins, interior din piele, motorizări mai puternice. Standard (VW Passat, Skoda Octavia) — automobile de familie de încredere cu pachet de bază. Diferență de preț: Premium de la €61/zi, Standard de la €31/zi.

**Pot rezerva un model specific?**
Da. Pe pagina de catalog apasă pe automobilul dorit și apoi „Închiriază acum”. Dacă modelul ales este temporar indisponibil, managerul îți va propune un analog apropiat din aceeași categorie la același preț.

**Există automobile electrice sau hibride în flotă?**
Da, în flotă sunt modele hibride și plug-in hybrid (PlugIn-Hybrid). Folosește filtrul „Combustibil” în catalog pentru a vedea toate automobilele electrificate disponibile în timp real.

**Ce tipuri de caroserie sunt disponibile?**
În flotă: sedanuri (Audi A4/A6, BMW Seria 3/5, Mercedes E-class), crossovere și SUV-uri (BMW X1/X3/X5, Audi Q5/Q7, Mercedes GLE), hatchback-uri (VW Polo, Skoda Fabia, Toyota Yaris) și minivan-uri pentru grupuri mari (până la 7-9 locuri).

**Care sunt preturile pentru chirie auto la PlusRent?**
Preturile pornesc de la €15/zi pentru categoria Economic, €30/zi pentru Standard si €60–€120/zi pentru Premium (BMW, Mercedes, Audi, Porsche). Toate tarifele includ asigurare RCA, 200 km/zi si suport 24/7. Fara avans la rezervare — platesti la preluarea masinii.

**Livrati masini la Aeroportul Chisinau?**
Da. Livrarea la Aeroportul International Chisinau (KIV) este gratuita (€0) in programul de lucru 08:00–18:00. In afara orelor de lucru se aplica o taxa de +€15 per ridicare/returnare. Serviciul este disponibil 24/7.

**Ce documente sunt necesare pentru a inchiria o masina?**
Ai nevoie de: permis de conducere valabil, buletin de identitate sau pasaport. Soferii cu varsta de 35+ ani inchiriaza fara depozit de garantie; pentru soferii sub 35 de ani se aplica un depozit returnabil. Varsta minima este 18 ani — experienta conteaza mai mult decat varsta. Toate datele sunt confidentiale.

**Care este durata minima de chirie auto?**
Durata minima de chirie auto este 24 de ore. Limita de kilometraj inclusa este de 200 km per zi. Pentru rezervari de 7+ zile sau pe termen lung oferim reduceri substantiale — intreaba la +373 60 000 500.

**Ce masini sunt disponibile pentru chirie auto?**
Flota PlusRent include: BMW, Mercedes-Benz, Audi, Porsche, Volkswagen, Hyundai, Honda, Toyota. Trei categorii: Economic (€15+), Standard (€30+) si Premium (€60+). Toate masinile sunt verificate tehnic, igienizate si includ climatizare + GPS.

**Exista taxe ascunse sau costuri suplimentare?**
Nu. Pretul afisat = pretul pe care il platesti. Posibile taxe transparente: livrare Aeroport Chisinau GRATIS (€0), Aeroport Iasi +€175, ridicare/returnare in afara orelor 08:00–18:00 +€15. Asigurarea RCA este inclusa in toate tarifele.

**Faceți livrare la Aeroportul Iași (România)?**
Da. PlusRent oferă livrare la Aeroportul Internațional Iași (IAS), România, contra unei taxe de €175. Distanța Chișinău–Iași este de aproximativ 3 ore de drum, iar șoferul nostru asistă trecerea frontierei. Este disponibilă și opțiunea one-way: preluare în Chișinău, returnare în Iași (sau invers). Util pentru zboruri internaționale Wizz Air, Ryanair, TAROM. Sună la +373 60 000 500 pentru a coordona ora exactă.

**Cum rezerv o masina?**
Rezervi online pe plusrent.md in mai putin de 2 minute sau suni la +373 60 000 500. Te contactam in maxim 24h pentru confirmare. Acceptam plata numerar (MDL/EUR) sau card bancar — plata la preluarea masinii.

### Personal Driver / Executive Chauffeur — Șofer Personal / Личный водитель

**Cat costa un sofer personal pe zi in Chisinau?**
PlusRent oferă două variante. Pe mașina ta: Standard 2.000 MDL/zi (8h), Business 2.800 MDL (10h), VIP 4.000 MDL (12h). Pe mașinile noastre (totul inclus 200km): Standard 3.500 MDL, Business 5.500 MDL (Audi A6 2022 / Lexus NX300h), VIP Executiv 8.500 MDL (Mercedes E / BMW 5). Plata la finalul zilei, fără avans.

**Care este diferența dintre cele două opțiuni de șofer personal?**
Cu mașina dumneavoastră — vine doar șoferul și conduce propria mașină; ideal dacă aveți o mașină și aveți nevoie doar de un profesionist la volan (de la 2.000 MDL/zi). Cu mașina noastră premium — un vehicul PlusRent (Audi A6 2022, Lexus NX300h, Mercedes E-Class sau BMW 5 Series) vine împreună cu șoferul, totul inclus: 200 km/zi, combustibil, asigurare și băuturi; ideal când doriți statutul și confortul unei mașini premium fără să o dețineți (de la 3.500 MDL/zi).

**Cine sunt soferii PlusRent?**
Șoferii PlusRent sunt profesioniști verificați cu minimum 5 ani experiență, în uniformă, multilingvi (română, rusă, engleză), discreți și punctuali. Toți au permis de conducere valabil, cazier curat și asigurare profesională.

**Pot beneficia de acelasi sofer la fiecare rezervare?**
Da. Opțiunea de același șofer este disponibilă pentru contracte recurente. Șoferul va învăța rutele și preferințele dumneavoastră. Pentru pachetele Corporativ și VIP — același șofer este inclus implicit.

**Există un număr minim de ore pentru rezervare?**
Rezervarea minimă este de 8 ore (pachetul Standard): de la 3.500 MDL cu mașina noastră premium sau de la 2.000 MDL cu mașina dumneavoastră. Orele suplimentare peste pachet se calculează proporțional — aproximativ 437 MDL pe oră suplimentară la pachetul Standard cu mașina noastră. Pentru contracte lunare sau corporative nu există minim, prețurile fiind personalizate.

**Exista reduceri pentru contracte mai lungi?**
Da. 5 zile sau mai mult: reducere 10%. 10 zile sau mai mult: reducere 15%. Contract lunar: reducere 20%. Abonament corporativ: până la 20% reducere plus rezervare prioritară, manager de cont dedicat, facturare lunară.

**Cum se efectueaza plata?**
Rezervări individuale — plata la finalul zilei, numerar (MDL sau EUR) sau card bancar. Lunar și corporativ — facturare lunară. Fără avans pentru persoane fizice.

**Este disponibil un sofer 24/7 la cerere?**
Da. Pachetul VIP la cerere oferă disponibilitate 24/7. Soluție specială pentru directori, demnitari și expați care călătoresc neregulat. Sunați la +373 60 000 500.

**Ce limbi vorbesc soferii?**
Toți șoferii vorbesc română și rusă. Engleza este disponibilă la cerere. Pentru pachetele Business și VIP — serviciu multilingv inclus implicit.

**Pot trece granița cu șoferul personal? Este inclus Transnistria?**
Da, trecerea granițelor este inclusă în tarif pentru toate pachetele. Excursiile populare: Transnistria (Tiraspol, Bender) — șoferul cunoaște procedurile vamale și asistă cu cardul migrațional; Iași, România (~150 km, 3h); Odesa, Ucraina (~190 km, 3,5h). Necesar doar pașaport valabil. Niciun cost suplimentar — totul inclus în pachetele Standard/Business/VIP, în limita celor 200 km/zi.

### Transfer Chișinău ↔ Iași — Transfer Iași / Трансфер Яссы

**Cât costă transferul Iași - Chișinău?**
Avem 3 pachete: Standard Privat €140, Business Comfort €175 (cea mai aleasă) și VIP Executive €230. Toate prețurile sunt per mașină (6+1 locuri), all-inclusive: WiFi, apă, asistență vamă Sculeni-Albița. Fără costuri ascunse. Plata la destinație.

**Cât durează drumul de la Iași la Chișinău?**
Distanța este de ~130 km . Drumul propriu-zis: 2–2,5 ore. La vama Sculeni-Albița : 30–60 minute. Total: ~3–3,5 ore . Șoferii noștri trec frontiera zilnic și cunosc toate procedurile pentru a minimiza așteptarea.

**Cum funcționează asistența la vamă?**
Punctul de trecere este Sculeni-Albița . Necesită pașaport valabil. Procesul durează 30–60 minute în medie. Șoferii noștri te asistă cu formalitățile, explică procesul și ajută cu documentele dacă e nevoie. Asistența la vamă este inclusă în toate pachetele.

**Ce mașini folosiți pentru transfer?**
Mașini premium 6+1 locuri: Audi A4 / Toyota Auris (Standard), Audi A6 2022 / Lexus NX300h (Business), Mercedes E-Class / BMW Seria 7 (VIP). Toate cu climate control, WiFi 4G, încărcătoare, curate și verificate zilnic.

**Pot rezerva transfer dus-întors?**
Da. Oferim tur-retur cu așteptare 4–8 ore . Prețuri: Standard €260, Business €310, VIP €400 . Tur-retur beneficiază de reducere automată -10% față de două transferuri separate.

**Șoferii vorbesc engleza?**
Toți șoferii vorbesc română și rusă . Engleza este disponibilă la cerere — menționează la rezervare. La VIP Executive , șoferi multilingvi (RO/RU/EN) sunt incluși implicit.

**Mă puteți duce la Castel Mimi / Cricova / Mileștii Mici din Iași?**
Da. Oferim transfer privat la toate cramele importante din Moldova de la Aeroportul Iași sau orice locație din Iași. Castel Mimi (Bulboaca): €195 Standard, €230 Business, €290 VIP. Cramele Cricova: €175. Mileștii Mici: €185. Prețuri per vehicul (6+1 locuri), nu pe persoană. Important: Oferim doar transport — tururile, degustările și taxele de intrare la cramă se rezervă separat, direct cu crama (recomandăm rezervare în avans).

### Airport Transfer Chișinău KIV — Transfer Aeroport / Трансфер аэропорт

**Cât costă transferul Aeroportul Chișinău — Chișinău?**
Transfer Aeroportul Chișinău — Chișinău Centru: Standard 800 MDL (€40) , Business Comfort 1.000 MDL (€50) , VIP Executive 1.400 MDL (€70) . Toate prețurile sunt totul inclus — WiFi, apă, asistență bagaje, așteptare inclusă. Distanța 13–15 km, durata 25–30 minute.

**Ce este inclus în prețul transferului?**
Toate transferurile includ: mașină premium (Audi A6 / Lexus / Mercedes în funcție de pachet), șofer profesionist multilingv (RO/RU/EN), WiFi 4G, apă îmbuteliată, încărcătoare USB, asistență bagaje, 30 min așteptare gratuită (60 min pentru VIP). Fără costuri ascunse.

**De cât timp în avans trebuie să rezerv?**
Recomandat minimum 4–6 ore în avans pentru a asigura vehiculul dorit. Pentru rezervări urgente (sub 2 ore), disponibilitate limitată — sunați direct: +373 60 000 500 . Serviciu disponibil non-stop, 24/7, inclusiv sărbători.

**Faceți transferuri din alte orașe ale Moldovei?**
Da, acoperim toată Moldova. Transfer la Aeroportul Chișinău de la: Bălți de la 2.000 MDL, Cahul de la 2.400 MDL, Comrat de la 1.600 MDL, Soroca de la 2.200 MDL, Orhei de la 800 MDL. Pentru rute speciale sunați.

**Câți pasageri pot călători?**
Vehiculele noastre au 4+1 locuri . Prețul este per vehicul, nu per persoană — indiferent că ești singur sau cu 6 persoane, costul este același. Bagajul este nelimitat (până la 6 valize standard). Fără costuri suplimentare.

**Cum funcționează Întâlnire & Primire la aeroport?**
La Business și VIP , șoferul te întâmpină în terminal cu o plăcuță cu numele tău, te ajută cu bagajele și te conduce direct la vehicul. La Standard , șoferul te așteaptă în parcarea aeroportului și îți trimite locația exactă prin SMS la aterizare.

**Cum plătesc pentru transfer?**
Fără plată în avans pentru rezervările individuale. Plătești șoferului la finalul cursei — numerar (MDL sau EUR) sau card bancar . Pentru companii și rezervări recurente oferim opțiuni de facturare lunară. Prețul fix este garantat.

**Ce se întâmplă dacă zborul meu întârzie?**
Monitorizăm zborurile în timp real. Dacă zborul tău întârzie, șoferul te așteaptă fără costuri suplimentare — 30 min incluse la Standard , 60 min la Business & VIP . Ulterior: 50 MDL per 15 minute suplimentare.

### Sober Driver — Șofer Treaz / Трезвый водитель

**Cât costă serviciul de șofer treaz în Chișinău?**
Prețul pornește de la 500 MDL pentru o cursă standard în Chișinău. Evenimente (nuntă, petrecere, cumătrie): 200 MDL/oră. Zone suburbane până la 30 km: de la 600 MDL. Clienții fideli beneficiază de reducere 10% . Plata la finalul cursei — numerar sau card, fără avans.

**În cât timp ajunge șoferul la mine?**
În Chișinău: 15–20 minute după apel. Dispeceratul confirmă ETA exact. Zone suburbane (până la 30 km): 25–40 minute.

**Serviciul este disponibil non-stop?**
Da, 24/7 — inclusiv weekend și sărbători legale (Revelion, Paște, Crăciun). Fără supliment de noapte.

**Șoferul vine cu mașina lui sau folosește mașina mea?**
Șoferul ajunge la tine cu transport propriu , apoi conduce mașina ta la destinație. Tu ajungi acasă în siguranță, mașina ta parcată la domiciliu în dimineața următoare.

**Ce zone acoperiți în afara Chișinăului?**
Chișinău integral + raza 30 km: Ialoveni, Durlești, Codru, Stăuceni, Cricova, Sîngera, Băcioi. Orice localitate din Moldova — distanțele mai mari se discută individual. Sună la +373 60 000 150 .

**Cum plătesc?**
Plătești la finalul cursei — numerar (MDL) sau card bancar . Fără avans, fără comisioane ascunse.

**Șoferii sunt angajații voștri?**
Da, toți șoferii sunt angajați PlusRent , nu freelanceri. Fiecare are permis valabil, 5+ ani experiență și este verificat personal de conducerea companiei.

**Care e amenda pentru condusul în stare de ebrietate în Moldova?**
Conform Art. 233 din Codul Contravențional al Republicii Moldova, conducerea cu alcoolemie peste 0,3 g/l se sancționează cu amendă 35.000–50.000 MDL și suspendarea permisului 6 luni – 3 ani. Un șofer treaz PlusRent de la 500 MDL este de aproximativ 70× mai ieftin decât amenda minimă. Vezi detalii complete la /ro/sofer-treaz-amenda-art-233.

**Care e diferența între șofer treaz și taxi?**
Șoferul treaz conduce mașina TA acasă — tu și mașina ta ajungeți împreună. Taxiul te duce doar pe tine, iar mașina ta rămâne la restaurant peste noapte (risc de blocare, costuri suplimentare a doua zi). Pentru aproximativ același preț, șoferul treaz elimină nevoia de a reveni dimineața după mașină. Comparație detaliată la /ro/sofer-treaz-vs-taxi.

### Company, Loyalty & Contact — Companie, Fidelitate & Contact

**Ce este programul de loialitate PlusRent?**
La fiecare a doua închiriere auto, clienții primesc acces la programul nostru de loialitate. Poți alege între două roți ale norocului: Roata Zilelor Gratuite (1-3 zile) sau Roata Reducerilor (1-14%). Fiecare rotație garantează un premiu!

**Cum funcționează Roata Zilelor Gratuite?**
Rotești roata și câștigi între 1-3 zile de închiriere complet gratuite pentru următoarea ta rezervare. Este o modalitate excelentă de a economisi bani și de a te bucura mai mult de serviciile noastre.

**Ce reduceri pot câștiga cu Roata Reducerilor?**
Roata Reducerilor oferă reduceri de la 1% până la 14% pentru următoarea închiriere. Cu cât ești mai norocos, cu atât economia ta este mai mare!

**Unde se află biroul PlusRent?**
Biroul nostru se află pe str. Meșterul Manole 20, Chișinău, Republica Moldova. Deservim de asemenea Aeroport Chișinău (livrare gratuită în programul de lucru) și Aeroport Iași. Asistență 24/7 la +373 60 000 500.

**Oferiți servicii în mai multe limbi?**
Da, oferim servicii complete în trei limbi: română, rusă și engleză. Echipa noastră vorbește fluent toate aceste limbi pentru confortul tău maxim.

**Ce include prețul de închiriere?**
Toate tarifele PlusRent includ asigurarea RCA (răspundere civilă auto), asistență rutieră 24/7 și 200 km/zi. Nu există costuri ascunse — prețul afișat este prețul final.

**Cum pot contacta PlusRent?**
Ne poți contacta telefonic la +373 60 000 500, prin email la support@plusrent.md, sau prin mesaj direct pe Instagram, Telegram sau TikTok. Suntem disponibili 24/7.

**Care este programul de lucru al PlusRent?**
Oferim servicii 24 de ore din 24, 7 zile pe săptămână, inclusiv în weekend și sărbători. Livrarea la Aeroport Chișinău este gratuită în programul de lucru (8:00-18:00), iar în afara acestuia se aplică taxă suplimentară.

**Unde este sediul PlusRent?**
Sediul nostru este la adresa: str. Meșterul Manole 20, Chișinău, MD-2044, Republica Moldova. Oferim și livrare la Aeroport Chișinău (gratuit în program) și Aeroport Iași (România, +€35).

**În ce limbi pot comunica cu PlusRent?**
Echipa noastră vorbește fluent română, rusă și engleză. Alege limba cu care te simți cel mai confortabil pentru comunicare.

**Cât de repede primiți răspuns la mesaje?**
De obicei răspundem în maxim 15 minute în timpul programului de lucru și în 1-2 ore în afara acestuia. Pentru urgențe, sunați direct la +373 60 000 500 — asistență 24/7.

**Pot face rezervarea prin telefon?**
Da, poți face rezervarea la +373 60 000 500 — răspundem 24/7. Sau poți folosi formularul online pe plusrent.md/ro/cars. Vei primi confirmarea în maxim 24 de ore.
